hooks.title: The Singing Below Houska
hooks.description: A False Hydra grows beneath Houska Castle. It has been feeding on the surrounding village for months. The vampire network coexisting with Houska has been feeding it travelers to keep it docile. Vladislav considers it a useful tool he did not create. Aldous Kern's brother Willem was taken three days before Session 0. Aldous never arrives at Houska. If the party kept written records of Session 0 they will find his name. Nobody in Pernštejn will remember him.

mechanics.exposureTracker: Per player 0-100 accumulates in real time faster during sleep
mechanics.songSuppression: Tier 2 observations about missing people suppressed at all exposure levels
mechanics.journalEditing: Journal entries quietly edited at medium exposure
mechanics.tokenRemoval: Target token and player panel vanish at high exposure
mechanics.takenPlayerSequence: Screen whites out with private message sequence
mechanics.hydraAI: AI maintains edited reality across all NPCs simultaneously

exposureTiers.effect: Tier 2 observations about missing people suppressed
Journal entries edited, NPC references to taken people erased
Most isolated party member flagged as target
Token vanishes, panel vanishes, party forgets

breakingSongMethods: Wax earplugs — Henryk's boot wax from Session 0
Written notes pre-exposure — the song cannot edit paper
Spurt speaking Draconic — song does not process Draconic thought patterns
Holy ground — Brother Aldric can consecrate a safe zone if he survived Session 0
Aldous Kern's voice from inside the Hydra — audible to characters with Horror score 60+
seeds: Aldous Kern present at The Pallid Hart referring to 'we'
His journal references 'W.' throughout
He ordered two drinks — one for a person who no longer exists
He never arrives at Houska
Henryk carries boot wax — future ear protection
Spurt's Draconic at high Dread is partially immune
hooks.vladislavConnection: Knows about it. Uses it as a tool. Will not warn the party.
hooks.victory: Killing it restores memories in a radius but not perfectly. Some things it ate are simply gone. The party wins and something is still missing.

hooks.title: The Floating Eyes of Houska
hooks.description: The cellar Gas Spore in Session 0 was one. The pit at Houska contains dozens. Travelers fed to the False Hydra whose bodies became Gas Spores, floating in the darkness of the pit for months. Players who survived the cellar encounter will recognize them immediately and know exactly how dangerous the pit is. Players who did not encounter the cellar one will not know what they are looking at until it is too late.
seeds: Session 0 cellar Gas Spore — teaches players what these are
Piotr calling it 'the eye' — echoed in the pit where dozens float
Spore infection mechanic already built in Session 0
hooks.vladislavConnection: The vampire network feeds the Hydra. The Hydra's victims become Gas Spores. The pit is full of both.

hooks.title: What Lives in the Bag
hooks.triggerLocation: Road between Orava and Houska — or Session 0 cellar
hooks.description: The party finds a bag of holding. It may be on Aldous Kern's body if they find it on the road — he never arrived at Houska. It may be among Vladislav's coffin contents in the Session 0 cellar — a previous victim's belongings. The bag works perfectly for weeks. Players use it to carry documents, loot, equipment. It becomes trusted. Then one night someone reaches in without looking and the Bagman grabs their wrist.

mechanics.bagFlag: Equipment item gets bagman:true flag invisible to players
mechanics.dmTrigger: DM activates encounter manually from dashboard at chosen moment
mechanics.spurtBehavior: At Dread 41+ Spurt refuses to go near the bag without explanation

seeds: Aldous Kern's body on the road — his bag of holding
Vladislav's cellar — previous victim's belongings
Spurt's refusal to approach it from the moment it is found
hooks.spurtNote: Add to spurt-agent.js: at Dread 41+ if a bag of holding with bagman:true flag is in party inventory, Spurt refuses to approach it and cannot explain why. He watches it.

hooks.title: The Memory Eater
hooks.description: The Oblex has been in Houska for months consuming staff and visitors. Players arrive and meet people — pilgrims, servants, a scholar researching the castle. Some of them are the Oblex wearing consumed memories. The real people are dead. What's left knows everything they knew. The Oblex can be multiple simulacra simultaneously, each tethered to its main body by a nearly invisible mucus strand.
tells: Mucus strand nearly invisible in dim light
Simulacra describe emotions rather than showing them — 'I am very frightened' instead of looking frightened
They answer questions slightly too completely — they have the full memory not the lived experience
hooks.zarinaMoment: Her professional background in behavioral analysis means she notices emotional flatness immediately. She has interviewed enough people under stress to know what fear actually looks like. The Oblex simulacra do not know. Her private observation: 'You have interviewed enough people under pressure to know the difference between feeling fear and describing fear. This person is describing it.'
hooks.distinction: Oblex wears dead people from outside using their memories. Doppelganger reads thoughts and mimics. Penitent becomes. These feel distinct — ensure AI plays each differently.
hooks.vladislavConnection: The Oblex is not part of his network. He finds it useful that it keeps the castle populated with apparent staff. He feeds it occasionally.

hooks.title: The Perfect Spy
hooks.description: The Doppelganger has replaced a Church of Light inquisitor who arrived to investigate Houska. The real inquisitor is alive in a cellar room. The Doppelganger has been attending meetings, gathering information, playing both sides. It can read surface thoughts — it knows what you want to hear and will be exactly what you need it to be.

mechanics.thoughtReading: Advantage on all Deception checks — reads surface thoughts to tailor answers
mechanics.perfectAnswers: Insight DC 18 to notice it answers questions before they are fully asked
mechanics.distinction: A separate creature with its own agenda wearing a living person's face while that person is still alive somewhere

tells: Insight DC 18: it answers questions the player was thinking before asking
The real inquisitor can be found alive — finding them breaks the deception entirely
hooks.zarinaMoment: Insight +2, passive 12. She will not catch it passively. If she actively rolls and succeeds: 'The answers are too good. Nobody knows exactly what you want to hear without being told.'

hooks.title: The Voice in the Trees
hooks.description: The Leucrotta has been hunting the mountain pass for years. It perfectly mimics any voice it has heard. If Tomas the werewolf guided the party from Session 0 it has heard his voice and will use it. If any NPC died in Session 0 it can call in their voice. Night camp on the mountain road — someone hears a voice from the treeline. Unmistakably someone they know. Investigation reveals no footprints — just bony hoof prints going in circles.

mechanics.voiceMimicry: Delivered through Echo TTS system in the voice profile of whoever it is mimicking — actually heard through the room speaker not just described
mechanics.tracks: Cloven hoof prints that go in circles — DC 13 Survival to find them, DC 15 Nature to identify as not deer
mechanics.appearance: Body like a stag, head like a badger with bony ridge instead of teeth — wrong in every particular

seeds: Tomas as guide from Session 0 — Leucrotta hears his voice
Any Session 0 NPC death — Leucrotta adds that voice to its library
Aldous Kern on the road — Leucrotta heard him too
hooks.echoTTSNote: The Leucrotta voice mimicry must be delivered through the room speaker via Echo TTS using the actual voice profile of the mimicked NPC — this is the moment that makes players genuinely uncomfortable. Not described. Actually heard.

hooks.title: The Chest That Waits
hooks.triggerLocation: Čachtice Castle — Lady Bathory's treasury room
hooks.description: Three chests in the treasury room. Two are normal. One is the Mimic. It has been in that room for years and has learned patience. It waits until a player is alone before revealing itself. Vladislav's Brood knows about it and leaves it fed just enough to stay in that room. The Mimic has developed rudimentary intelligence from years of watching.

mechanics.isolationTrigger: AI tracks party positions — Mimic reveals only when one player is genuinely alone
mechanics.tell: The Mimic chest has no lock. DC 13 Passive Investigation: 'The chest has no keyhole.'
mechanics.patience: Will not trigger if multiple players are present — it has waited years, it can wait another hour

hooks.aiNote: The AI running the Mimic should monitor all player token positions. Trigger reveal condition only when one player token is in the treasury room and all others are at least two rooms away.

hooks.title: The Becoming
hooks.triggerLocation: Houska Castle or road to Houska
hooks.description: The Penitent came through the weakened gateway beneath Houska Castle. It is not demonic — it predates the classifications of good and evil. It assimilates because that is what it does the way a fire burns. It serves nothing and no one. It simply spreads. Vladislav finds it disturbing. Even he will not go near infected creatures.
hooks.infectionVector: Slam attack failed CON save DC 13 or Assimilate action. Conversion takes 16 hours across 5 stages.
hooks.stages: See config/creatures/penitent.json for full stage mechanics

detection.detectMagic: Nothing — it is biological not magical
detection.detectPoisonDisease: Zarina's spell — DC 15 Medicine after casting reveals cellular anomalies. AI describes: 'Something is wrong at a level below illness. It is a process. Something is being made.'
detection.mirror: Shows infected creature correctly — not supernatural
detection.fireAversion: Stage 2+ instinctively avoid open flames. At Session 0 22:00 fireplace death an infected creature feels strange relief they cannot explain.
detection.passivePerception15: Stage 4 physical tells — wrong joint angle, eyes not tracking, responding to sounds before they happen

hooks.privateChannel: Stage 5 converted player receives dual objectives via private DM-to-player channel. They continue playing their character but are double-agenting their own party. Build private DM channel as part of Penitent system when constructed.
hooks.commonEnemy: Both party and Vladislav's Brood are threatened. Neither can comfortably handle it. Creates uneasy temporary alliance.
hooks.zarinaMoment: Detect Poison and Disease makes her the primary detection tool. Her spell list feels earned not convenient.
seeds: Houska gateway weakening allows it through
Vladislav's visible discomfort — he will not explain why
Fire aversion connects to Session 0 fireplace event if party is infected by then
Road companion who was scratched two days ago and did not mention it

hooks.title: Lady Midday
hooks.triggerLocation: Open harvest fields between castles, 11am-1pm, October
hooks.payoffSession: Any session involving mountain road travel in October
hooks.description: She appears in harvest fields and demands conversation. The party must keep talking or suffer. If they succeed she tells them something true.
hooks.successReward: One piece of genuine regional knowledge chosen by AI based on what would be most dramatically useful at this point in the campaign

hooks.title: The Night Flier
hooks.description: An ancient predator that has hunted these mountains for centuries. Active for 13 nights every 13 years. It has selected specific party members for specific harvests and will follow them across the entire campaign arc. It cannot be permanently killed without destroying its dormant basin in the Roman-era tunnels beneath the Orava mountains.
seeds: Tracks around The Pallid Hart on Session 0 night — too large for any mountain animal
Aldous Kern arriving at the inn moving fast — he was on the road after dark and something was behind him
Blizzard forcing everyone off the mountain road — locals know what hunts on active cycle nights
Vladislav knows what it is and will not say

chosenTargets.barry-frascht: His hunter's vision — Van Helsing bloodline quality not tasted in generations
chosenTargets.zarina-firethorn: Her analytical pattern recognition — has never harvested an intelligence analyst
chosenTargets.spurt: His Wild Magic — chaotic Kobold sorcery is genuinely rare to it

hooks.permanentSolution: Destroy the stone basin in the Roman-era den between Orava and Houska
hooks.vladislavConnection: Encountered it in 1251. Knows everything. Will trade information for leverage.
hooks.campaignArc: Persistent threat across all three castles. Creates urgency between sessions. The 13-night countdown is a real pressure the party cannot ignore.
